sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) as total FROM payments WHERE DATE(paid_at)=CURRENT_DATE

text: tổng tiền hôm nay là bao nhiêu
sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) as total FROM payments WHERE DATE(paid_at)=CURRENT_DATE

text: hôm nay thu được bao nhiêu
sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) as total FROM payments WHERE DATE(paid_at)=CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) as total FROM payments WHERE DATE(paid_at)=CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'

text: hôm qua bán được bao nhiêu
sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) as total FROM payments WHERE DATE(paid_at)=CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'

text: hôm qua kiếm được bao nhiêu tiền
sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) as total FROM payments WHERE DATE(paid_at)=CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) as total FROM payments WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', paid_at)=DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)

text: tháng này kiếm được bao nhiêu
sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) as total FROM payments WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', paid_at)=DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)

text: so sánh hôm nay và hôm qua
sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) FROM payments WHERE DATE(paid_at)=CURRENT_DATE) as today,
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) FROM payments WHERE DATE(paid_at)=CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') as yesterday

text: hôm nay tăng hay giảm so với hôm qua
sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) FROM payments WHERE DATE(paid_at)=CURRENT_DATE) as today,
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) FROM payments WHERE DATE(paid_at)=CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') as yesterday

text: so sánh tháng này và tháng trước
sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) FROM payments WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', paid_at)=DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)) as current,
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) FROM payments WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', paid_at)=DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')) as previous

text: tháng này tăng hay giảm so với tháng trước
sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) FROM payments WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', paid_at)=DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)) as current,
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) FROM payments WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', paid_at)=DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')) as previous

    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) FROM payments WHERE DATE_TRUNC('year', paid_at)=DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year')) as previous
